caption: Participation in public good by housing type (House vs. Apartment) under Anonymous and Observable conditions.
description: A bar chart showing participation rates in a public good. For houses, participation is ~2.5% (Anonymous) and ~4% (Observable). For apartments, participation is ~5% (Anonymous) and ~11.5% (Observable).

caption: Participation in public good by tenure (Renter vs. Owner) under Anonymous and Observable conditions.
description: A bar chart showing participation rates in a public good. For renters, participation is ~4.5% (Anonymous) and ~6% (Observable). For owners, participation is ~2.5% (Anonymous) and ~10% (Observable).
